subject: Fixed concurrency issue in PNF uploading
commit_message:
Fixed concurrency issue in PNF uploading

Issue-ID: AAI-3100
Signed-off-by: kuldipr <kuldip.rai@amdocs.com>
Change-Id: Ieb09d45f50429259c1e40d46b6c944cf552d027a

entries.message:
